title: The Bangladesh Bank Order, 1972 (President's Order)
description: [WHEREAS, it is necessary to establish a central bank in Bangladesh to manage the monetary and credit system of Bangladesh with a view to stabilising domestic monetary value and maintaining a competitive external par value of the Bangladesh Taka towards fostering growth and development of country’s productive resources in the best national interest;] NOW, THEREFORE, in pursuance of the Proclamation of Independence...

provisions.chapter: Chapter V: [PROVISIONS RELATING TO NON-BANKING INSTITUTIONS RECEIVING DEPOSITS AND FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
provisions.title: 1. Omitted
provisions.content: Omitted by section 50 of আর্থিক প্রতিষ্ঠান আইন, ১৯৯৩ (১৯৯৩ সনের ২৭ নং আইন)]

provisions.title: 2. [Omitted]
provisions.content: 68. [Omitted by section 21 of the Bangladesh Bank (Amendment) Act, 2003 (Act No. IX of 2003).]
